note: CKEditor Accordion is a CKEditor 5 plugin module: a toolbar button enabled per text format, a small settings form (no config schema), and a global frontend behavior. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded), probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: How do I make the Accordion button available to editors in CKEditor 5 on a Drupal site? Where is it enabled?
evals.expected_output: It is a per-text-format CKEditor 5 toolbar item: edit a format at Admin → Content authoring → Text formats and editors and drag the Accordion button onto the active toolbar.

evals.prompt: What is the CKEditor 5 plugin id and toolbar item name that CKEditor Accordion registers?
evals.expected_output: The CKEditor 5 plugin is accordion.Accordion and the toolbar item id is Accordion (defined in ckeditor_accordion.ckeditor5.yml).

evals.prompt: What HTML markup does a CKEditor Accordion produce in the saved body content?
evals.expected_output: A description list: <dl class="ckeditor-accordion"> with paired <dt> titles and <dd> content rows.

evals.prompt: Which HTML tags must a text format's allowed HTML permit for CKEditor Accordion to work?
evals.expected_output: The plugin's elements: <dl>, <dl class>, <dt>, <dd> — the class on <dl> is required for the frontend behavior to attach.

evals.prompt: Which CKEditor Accordion setting lets multiple accordion rows stay open at once instead of closing others, and what config object holds it?
evals.expected_output: The keep_rows_open key (default 0) on the ckeditor_accordion.settings config; when enabled, opening a row does not close already-open rows.

evals.prompt: By default CKEditor Accordion opens the first row. Which setting makes all rows start collapsed, and how do I set it with drush?
evals.expected_output: Set collapse_all on ckeditor_accordion.settings, e.g. drush cset ckeditor_accordion.settings collapse_all 1.

evals.prompt: Where is the CKEditor Accordion global settings form, and what permission is required to access it?
evals.expected_output: Form at /admin/config/content/ckeditor-accordion (route ckeditor_accordion.settings), gated by the 'administer ckeditor accordion' permission.

evals.prompt: I want to put icons / HTML inside CKEditor Accordion row titles. Which setting enables that?
evals.expected_output: Enable allow_html_in_titles (default 0) on ckeditor_accordion.settings to permit HTML inside the <dt> row titles.
